items.content: Yuki Tanaka: The user. A 28-year-old UX/UI designer based in Tokyo, Japan. She has a background in graphic design and pursues several creative side projects.
Mid-size E-commerce Company: Yuki's current employer. She works as a UX/UI designer here, contributing to the company's online presence and user experience strategies.
Tama Art University: Yuki's alma mater. She studied graphic design here, laying the foundation for her career and creative pursuits.

Illustration Account: A significant side project for Yuki. She maintains an illustration account on Instagram which has garnered a substantial following of 40,000 users. This highlights her artistic talent and online reach.
Etsy: An online marketplace where Yuki sells her custom resin jewellery. This represents another entrepreneurial venture and a platform for her craft.
Retro-Gaming Stream: Yuki co-runs a weekly YouTube stream focused on retro gaming. This indicates a passion for vintage video games and collaborative content creation.
Studio Ghibli Films: Yuki is an avid fan of these animated movies. This suggests an appreciation for art, storytelling, and Japanese animation.
Street Photography: A personal interest of Yuki. This hobby reflects her observational skills and engagement with urban environments.
Matcha Tasting Tours: Yuki enjoys participating in these tours. This indicates a specific culinary interest and a way she explores her local area.
Tokyo, Japan: Yuki's current residence. This is the primary location associated with her professional and personal life.
